liminal_loop_game.description: Liminal Loop (Exit-8 style) anomaly-detection corridor walker. Each iteration the system rolls for an anomaly and (if hit) mutates one named prop in the corridor — tipping a trashcan, opening a side door, reddening the lights, etc. Player commits a choice by walking out the FAR door (continue) or the NEAR door (turn back). Wrong choice resets the exit number to 0; right choice advances toward the win threshold.
